title: Quantum Lab
description: From-scratch quantum lab in TypeScript with FIVE simulation engines: state-vector, density-matrix, stabilizer-tableau (Clifford circuits to 30 qubits), a Matrix Product State tensor network with a from-scratch complex SVD, and an exact free-fermion (Jordan–Wigner + Bogoliubov) solver for the transverse-field Ising chain — running arbitrary circuits on 40 qubits in O(n·χ²) memory with error-tracked bond truncation, perfect sampling and per-cut entanglement entropy. On top of the tensor network: TEBD real-time dynamics of the Ising chain (quench light-cone, matched to exact), and full two-site DMRG — Matrix Product Operators + incremental environments + a matrix-free Lanczos eigensolver finding the ground state of the Ising and Heisenberg/XXZ chains, matching exact diagonalisation to ~1e-13 with a vanishing ⟨H²⟩−⟨H⟩² eigenstate certificate at lengths far past exact diag, plus a phase-transition scan that locates quantum critical points from the ground-state entanglement peak. And now TOPOLOGICAL ERROR CORRECTION: the rotated surface code [[d²,1,d]] with a real Minimum-Weight Perfect Matching decoder — a faithful from-scratch implementation of Edmonds' blossom algorithm (Galil's O(V³) primal-dual matching, verified against brute force) running on a graph of lit-up parity checks weighted by lattice distance. Inject X/Z errors on an interactive lattice and watch the checks fire, the matching form, and the residual be classified as a stabilizer or a logical failure; a Monte-Carlo sweep reproduces the ≈10.3% error-correction threshold where the distance-3/5/7 curves cross. And now FAULT TOLERANCE IN SPACE-TIME: a phenomenological noise model with T repeated noisy syndrome rounds decoded on a 3-D space-time matching graph (time edges absorb measurement errors), a from-scratch Union-Find decoder (Delfosse–Nivelle: near-linear cluster growth + peeling, cross-checked against MWPM), the phenomenological threshold (~3%), and finite-size scaling — the Λ = p_L(d)/p_L(d+2) suppression factor plus a universal data collapse that fits (p_th, ν). And now AN EXACT FREE-FERMION ENGINE: the transverse-field Ising chain is secretly free, so the Jordan–Wigner transform + a Bogoliubov–de Gennes diagonalisation (which is literally a singular-value decomposition of an n×n matrix, reusing the same from-scratch complex SVD) solve it EXACTLY in O(n³) at hundreds of sites the 2ⁿ vector cannot hold and DMRG only approximates — an exact oracle that reproduces the lab's own TFIM ground energy from exact diagonalisation to machine precision and then runs far past it. It gives the Bogoliubov spectrum and ground energy E₀=−½ΣΛ_k, the quasiparticle gap 2|J−h| closing at the quantum critical point h=J, block entanglement from the ground state's MAJORANA COVARIANCE matrix (Peschel) that recovers the Ising-CFT central charge c=½ via a Calabrese–Cardy fit, a ground energy per site matching the closed-form Pfeuty thermodynamic integral, and an exact real-time QUENCH whose Gaussian correlation matrices evolve in O(n³) per step — reproducing the entanglement light-cone at sizes whose Schmidt rank 2^S no MPS or exact simulator could store, every small-n step cross-checked against exact dense evolution. And now DYNAMICAL QUANTUM PHASE TRANSITIONS: the engine, generalised to the anisotropic XY chain (the Ising point is γ=1) and solved in momentum space with periodic boundaries, makes the headline non-equilibrium effect of the decade exactly tractable — quench across the critical point and the Loschmidt return-rate function l(t)=−lim(1/N)ln|⟨ψ₀|e^{−iH_f t}|ψ₀⟩|² develops non-analytic CUSPS in real time (Heyl–Polkovnikov–Kehrein) at the critical times tₙ*=(2n+1)π/εₖ*, with an integer DYNAMICAL TOPOLOGICAL ORDER PARAMETER ν_D(t) (the Pancharatnam geometric-phase winding, Budich–Heyl) that is 0 before the first cusp and jumps by exactly +1 at each — both cross-checked to ~1e-14 against an independent dense 2ⁿ time evolution — plus the XY phase diagram and the exact mutual information between disjoint blocks. And now SHOR'S ALGORITHM: integer factoring by quantum order-finding, built from scratch end to end — to factor N, find the period r of x ↦ a·x mod N by phase-estimating the eigenphase s/r of the modular-multiplication unitary, then recover r with a continued fraction so gcd(a^(r/2)±1, N) are real factors. Two independent quantum circuits (a full (n+t)-qubit register with controlled modular multipliers + an inverse QFT, and the hardware-friendly iterative one-ancilla variant with classical feedback) are graded against an exact closed-form Dirichlet-kernel distribution to machine precision, and the Shor tab actually factors 15, 21, 33, 35… live with an order-finding spectrum, the continued-fraction reconstruction, and a factor tree. And now THE ONE-WAY QUANTUM COMPUTER: measurement-based quantum computation built from scratch — no gates, just a fixed entangled CLUSTER STATE measured qubit-by-qubit in adaptive single-qubit bases. A faithful measurement calculus (Danos–Kashefi–Panangaden: N/E/M commands with feed-forward angles φ=(−1)^{sX}α+sZπ) and a universal {J(α),CZ} compiler turn any single-qubit unitary (via its Euler angles) and CNOT into a cluster + measurement schedule, propagating the Pauli byproduct operators symbolically; a dynamic state-vector engine frees every qubit the instant it is measured, so a computation of any depth keeps a live register no bigger than the number of logical wires (a deep two-wire circuit spreads across dozens of physical qubits but never holds more than three). The headline — determinism from randomness — is verified to machine precision: every run records different measurement outcomes, yet undoing the known byproduct frame yields a byte-for-byte identical logical state, cross-checked against an independent dense circuit-model oracle over hundreds of random inputs and outcome strings; cluster states are shown to be the graph states stabilised by K_v=X_v∏Z_w. Also: Kraus noise, a complex Hermitian eigensolver, Bloch spheres, Schmidt decomposition, error-correcting codes (bit/phase-flip, 9-qubit Shor, Steane [[7,1,3]] with live syndrome decoding), phase estimation, VQE with analytic parameter-shift gradients & QAOA, randomized benchmarking, OpenQASM export, and a 95-case self-test suite cross-checking every engine against exact references.
